description: SciSpace is a research-focused web platform that offers tools for literature review, paper discovery, writing assistance, and interacting with PDFs and scientific content. Its public site presents end-user research tools and content directories.
summary: SciSpace exposes a public MCP server at `https://scispace.com/mcp-kls34hjb`; no public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI integration surface was found on `scispace.com`.
